mapper.select: select u.user_id, u.nick_name, u.user_account, u.email, u.avatar, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.remark from sys_user u ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select distinct u.user_id, u.user_account, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time from sys_user u left join sys_user_role sur on u.user_id = sur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = sur.role_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select distinct u.user_id, u.user_account, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time from sys_user u left join sys_user_role sur on u.user_id = sur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = sur.role_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}
